title: Cloud API Overrun Cost Calculator
description: Calculates the total cost impact of API overrun events in cloud services, incorporating latency penalties, retry costs, data egress, and SLA breach compensation. Aligns with ISO 9001, Six Sigma DMAIC, and WERC cost-to-serve standards.

inputs.label: Monthly API Call Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total number of API calls made per month, including successful and overrun calls.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of API calls made per month, including successful and overrun calls.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Başarılı ve aşım çağrıları dahil aylık toplam API çağrısı sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der API-Aufrufe pro Monat, einschließlich erfolgreicher und übermäßiger Aufrufe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'appels API par mois, y compris les appels réussis et les dépassements.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de llamadas API realizadas por mes, incluyendo llamadas exitosas y excedidas.

inputs.label: Overrun Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of API calls that exceed the agreed response time threshold (e.g., >200ms).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of API calls that exceed the agreed response time threshold (e.g., >200ms).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kabul edilen yanıt süresi eşiğini (örn. >200ms) aşan API çağrılarının yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der API-Aufrufe, die den vereinbarten Antwortzeitschwellenwert (z. B. >200 ms) überschreiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'appels API qui dépassent le seuil de temps de réponse convenu (ex. >200ms).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de llamadas API que superan el umbral de tiempo de respuesta acordado (p. ej., >200 ms).

inputs.label: Average Overrun Duration
inputs.businessContext: Average extra time beyond the SLA threshold for overrun calls.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average extra time beyond the SLA threshold for overrun calls.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aşım çağrıları için SLA eşiğinin ötesindeki ortalama ek süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche zusätzliche Zeit über den SLA-Schwellenwert hinaus für Überlaufaufrufe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps supplémentaire moyen au-delà du seuil SLA pour les appels en dépassement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo extra promedio más allá del umbral de SLA para llamadas excedidas.

inputs.label: Cost per API Call
inputs.businessContext: Direct cost per API call (compute, network, storage).

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct cost per API call (compute, network, storage).
businessContext_i18n.tr: API çağrısı başına doğrudan maliyet (işlem, ağ, depolama).
businessContext_i18n.de: Direkte Kosten pro API-Aufruf (Rechenleistung, Netzwerk, Speicher).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût direct par appel API (calcul, réseau, stockage).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo directo por llamada API (cómputo, red, almacenamiento).

inputs.label: Retry Cost per Call
inputs.businessContext: Additional cost incurred when a call is retried due to timeout or error.

label_i18n.fr: Coût de nouvelle tentative par appel

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional cost incurred when a call is retried due to timeout or error.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zaman aşımı veya hata nedeniyle bir çağrı yeniden denendiğinde oluşan ek maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Kosten, die bei einem erneuten Aufruf aufgrund von Zeitüberschreitung oder Fehler anfallen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût supplémentaire encouru lorsqu'un appel est relancé en raison d'un délai d'attente ou d'une erreur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo adicional incurrido cuando una llamada se reintenta debido a tiempo de espera o error.

inputs.label: Retry Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of overrun calls that trigger a retry.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of overrun calls that trigger a retry.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeniden denemeyi tetikleyen aşım çağrılarının yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der überlaufenen Aufrufe, die eine Wiederholung auslösen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'appels en dépassement qui déclenchent une nouvelle tentative.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de llamadas excedidas que desencadenan un reintento.

inputs.label: Monthly Data Egress
inputs.businessContext: Total data transferred out of the cloud per month.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total data transferred out of the cloud per month.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Buluttan aylık toplam dışa aktarılan veri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Datenmenge, die pro Monat aus der Cloud übertragen wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume total de données sortant du cloud par mois.
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de datos transferidos fuera de la nube por mes.

inputs.label: Egress Cost per GB
inputs.businessContext: Cost per GB of data egress (varies by provider and region).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost per GB of data egress (varies by provider and region).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Veri çıkışının GB başına maliyeti (sağlayıcıya ve bölgeye göre değişir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten pro GB Datenabfluss (variiert je nach Anbieter und Region).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût par Go de sortie de données (varie selon le fournisseur et la région).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo por GB de salida de datos (varía según el proveedor y la región).

rules.message: Overrun rate must be between 0% and 100%.
Retry rate must be between 0% and 100%.
SLA penalty percentage must be between 0% and 100%.
Average overrun duration must be greater than 0 ms.

rules.condition: cost_per_call >= 0 AND retry_cost_per_call >= 0 AND egress_cost_per_gb >= 0 AND monthly_service_fee >= 0
rules.message: All cost inputs must be non-negative.
If overrun rate is 0%, retry rate must also be 0%.

thresholds.alert: Total overrun cost exceeds $10,000. Immediate review recommended.
Retry cost exceeds $5,000. Consider optimizing retry logic.
Overrun rate above 10% indicates high SLA breach risk.
Data egress exceeds 10 TB. Review data transfer patterns.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
